canonical_definition: A technique for interpreting model components by projecting their hidden state outputs into the vocabulary space to reveal which tokens they most contribute to predicting.
papers: DRAMA: Diverse Augmentation from Large Language Models to Smaller Dense Retrievers
Learning to Look at the Other Side: A Semantic Probing Study of Word Embeddings inLLMs with Enabled Bidirectional Attention
